steps.expression: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('div.min-h-0.flex-1.overflow-x-hidden.overflow-y-auto.overscroll-contain.custom-scrollbar'); return Boolean(el && el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight); })()

(() => { const el = document.querySelector('div.min-h-0.flex-1.overflow-x-hidden.overflow-y-auto.overscroll-contain.custom-scrollbar'); if (!el) return false; el.scrollTop = 800; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('scroll', { bubbles: true })); return el.scrollTop > 0; })()

(() => { const el = document.querySelector('div.min-h-0.flex-1.overflow-x-hidden.overflow-y-auto.overscroll-contain.custom-scrollbar'); if (!el) return false; el.scrollTop = 1600; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('scroll', { bubbles: true })); return el.scrollTop >= 800; })()

(() => { const el = document.querySelector('div.min-h-0.flex-1.overflow-x-hidden.overflow-y-auto.overscroll-contain.custom-scrollbar'); if (!el) return false; el.scrollTop = 2400; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('scroll', { bubbles: true })); return el.scrollTop >= 1200; })()

(() => { const el = document.querySelector('div.min-h-0.flex-1.overflow-x-hidden.overflow-y-auto.overscroll-contain.custom-scrollbar'); if (!el) return false; el.scrollTop = 1200; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('scroll', { bubbles: true })); return el.scrollTop >= 800; })()

(() => { const el = document.querySelector('div.min-h-0.flex-1.overflow-x-hidden.overflow-y-auto.overscroll-contain.custom-scrollbar'); if (!el) return false; el.scrollTop = 0; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('scroll', { bubbles: true })); return el.scrollTop === 0; })()
